title: [No Signal Error]
description: A creeper entity texture pack! Because of course it is.
body:
Another creeper texture adjustment, brought to you by yours truly.

This texturepack takes advantage of how certain shaders mark specific hexcodes to be emmissives, resulting in a creeper that looks like a bright glowing broadcast error. All in all, just a silly texture change to bring a little more chaos (and hopefully enjoyment) to your playing experience.


For the best effect, please use [Complimentary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) or [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound)
